support.detail: IAG GBS is a $200K Formal Evaluation deal (win 44) with no pricing, product, presales, or exec-connect blocker surfaced. No Economic Buyer is yet identified to warrant a CEO peer connect, and no commercial approval is stuck. Any escalation here is standard RSD/VP work.
support.why_not_vp: Nothing here is CEO-irreplaceable; a VP/CRO fully covers a mid-evaluation shortlist deal with active engagement.

monitor.reason: Deal is actively engaged (3 days since last activity); outstanding items are buyer-dependent, not our lapse.
